requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL 定义 AI runtime hook contract，用于通过现有 module extension/manifest 的 `hooks` 字段声明 Sparrow-aligned hook point、mode、matcher、priority、timeout、failure policy、标准组件 handler 与 result action。

case.given: 某个 module 需要扩展 runtime 生命周期
case.then: hook SHALL 写入现有 module extension/manifest 的 `hooks` 字段
hook point SHALL be a string using `domain.action.phase` naming such as `actor.idle.before` or `tool.execute.after`
hook SHALL 以数据 definition 表达 point、mode、name、extensionId、priority、matcher、timeoutMs、failOpen 与 handler component reference
hook descriptor SHALL 能被 composer/runtime assembly 收集

case.given: 某个 hook definition 被声明
case.then: mode SHALL be one of `observe`、`transform`、`decision`、`around`
result action SHALL be one of `continue`、`replace`、`deny`、`ask`、`retry`、`stop`
系统 SHALL NOT introduce a parallel enum-only lifecycle event model for hook points
结果 SHALL 使用标准 action、payload/output/message/metadata 与可选 structured effects 表达需要 runtime 应用的副作用
hook handler SHALL NOT 直接绕过 actor mailbox 修改其他 actor 的内部状态

case.given: dispatcher 完成一次 hook dispatch
case.when: 至少一个 hook 被 matched、failed、timed out 或 skipped by reentrancy
case.then: dispatcher SHALL emit a diagnostic report with event type `hook_dispatch_report`
report SHALL include point、trace/session/actor context、final action、elapsed time、steps、payload 与 output

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL 在 `ai-organ-logic` 中提供 hook dispatcher，负责匹配、排序、reentrancy guard、预算、timeout、错误策略、`hook_dispatch_report` diagnostics、标准组件 handler 调用与 result/effect 归一化。

case.given: runtime assembly 中存在多个 enabled hook descriptors
case.when: dispatcher 收到某个 lifecycle invocation
case.then: dispatcher SHALL 只执行 point 与 matcher 匹配的 hooks
dispatcher SHALL 按 phase、priority desc、extensionId、name 形成稳定顺序

case.given: 某个 hook 正在同一 point 上执行
case.when: hook 执行过程中再次触发相同 guard key 的 hook dispatch
case.then: dispatcher SHALL 跳过 reentrant invocation
dispatcher SHALL 记录 reentrant skipped diagnostic
dispatcher SHALL 记录 failed 或 timed_out diagnostic
dispatcher SHALL 根据 hook 的 failOpen 策略决定继续或停止本轮 dispatch

case.given: dispatcher 准备执行某个 matched hook handler
case.then: dispatcher SHALL use `depa-processor` `runByFuncStyleAdapter` to execute the hook handler component
hook handler SHALL express outer input、derived、inner runtime、inner input、inner config、core logic 与 outer output through the standard component flow

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL 在 `ai-organ-logic` 中生产 lifecycle hook invocation，调用同包 lifecycle hook dispatcher，并在 runtime 串行 mutation 边界应用 hook effects。

case.given: interactive turn 完成并清理 runtime active turn 标记
case.when: runtime 进入可继续调度状态
case.then: organ runtime SHALL 生产 lifecycle invocation 用于检查 runtime idle

case.given: 没有前台 turn 正在运行
case.then: organ runtime MAY 生产 runtime idle lifecycle invocation
watchdog SHALL NOT 直接调用具体 goal continuation 逻辑

case.given: hook dispatcher 返回 mailbox enqueue 或 resume fiber effect
case.then: effects SHALL 通过 orchestrator driver 和 actor mailbox 机制应用
effect application SHALL 发生在 coordinator 串行 enqueue 边界内

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL 对高频 `actor.idle.before` hook point 使用确定性、受预算约束、可重检状态的编排方式，避免多个 hooks 同时基于过期 idle 状态产生冲突 effects。

case.given: 同一 idle cycle 中有多个 `actor.idle.before` hooks 匹配
case.when: dispatcher 准备执行下一个 idle hook
case.then: dispatcher 或 producer SHALL 基于最新 VM/driver state 重建 idle snapshot
如果 runtime 已不再 idle，本轮 idle dispatch SHALL 停止

case.given: 某个 idle hook 返回 `stop` action
case.then: dispatcher SHALL stop subsequent hooks in the current `actor.idle.before` dispatch
如果 hook 返回 `continue` 或 `replace`，dispatcher SHALL 按标准结果合并规则继续或应用 payload/output/effect

case.given: idle hook list 很长或某些 hook 执行较慢
case.when: 本轮 idle dispatch 达到最大 hook 数或总耗时预算
case.then: dispatcher SHALL 停止本轮 dispatch
dispatcher SHALL 发出 budget exhausted diagnostic

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL prevent `actor.idle.before` hooks from running as idle continuation while any wake-capable actor mailbox has pending work.

case.given: An actor has pending `control`, `toolResult`, `asyncCompletion`, `childDone`, `memberCoordination`, `humanInput`, `memberChatInbox`, or `heartbeat` entries
case.then: The producer SHALL treat the actor as non-idle
The dispatch SHALL stop before goal continuation or other idle effects are produced

case.given: An idle hook dispatch is skipped because lifecycle state is no longer current
case.then: The diagnostic SHOULD include the pending mailbox kinds that made the actor non-idle
Repeated equivalent diagnostics SHOULD be throttled or coalesced to avoid flooding orchestration history

case.given: The background watchdog observes a ready fiber or pending wake mailbox work
case.then: The runtime SHALL attempt scheduler drain before producing lower-priority idle continuation effects
